projects.title: VFX astronaut on office
projects.desc: I created this simple VFX video for my social media platforms, it was a trial for VFX Art in blender, I modeled this Low-Poly astronaut rigged it, composited it, animated it and rendered it all in blender  .

projects.title: Daisy Blusher
projects.desc:
Made simple motion to the bottle and make it fall into the golden stand in the golden studio, have it filled with the blusher liquid, used the liquid effect in blender to make a dreamy motion. Lastly make it covered with the brush bottle cover.
â€œthe design is by Daisy by Jasmine brand.
The logo is not the brand logo because it is not a collaboration â€œ
The final shot is inspired by the color of the blush, I added a liquid blush lake â€œadded a simulationâ€
then added beautiful Dhalias and hanging flowers that has the same color as the blusher

projects.title: Bosidin Laser Hair Removal
projects.desc: This commercial implies both luxury and speed, I tried to add lights and flashed to resemble the idea of the product, it is like both femininity, smoothness and efficiency at the same time. I paid attention to the model details very well, and the element are simple to make the focus on the product details, added smooth and fast motions and the same time for both the product and the camera.

projects.title: Mina Al Sheikhly Mascara Comercial
projects.desc: The animation opens with a stylized graphic eye element that dynamically transitions to open the blurred glass door to reveal a metallic, turquoise mascara tube floating against a moody, dark background. Utilizing dramatic macro close-ups and smooth camera tracking, the video highlights the sleek product design, glossy textures, and precise branding before executing a clean mechanical separation to reveal the mascara wand and brush.

projects.title: Stylized Halloween Environment
projects.desc: Halloween-themed loop that blends spooky elements with a playful, low-poly aesthetic. The video opens with a close-up of smoke rising from the chimney of a house with a red-tiled roof, before zooming out to reveal a miniature, fenced-in home situated on a surreal, warped black-and-white checkered landscape. The scene is filled with festive animations, including a classic sheet ghost floating down a wooden path, a skeleton sitting by a fence, and multiple glowing, animated jack-o'-lanterns scattered throughout the yard.
